extension.description: Edit IBM Z file bytes in an ISPF-style HEX ON view with IBM EBCDIC DBCS preview and SO/SI diagnostics.
command.openHexOn.title: IBM Z Hex Editor: Open HEX ON
configuration.title: IBM Z HEX ON Editor
configuration.maxFileSizeKb.description: Maximum local file size, in KB, that can be opened in the HEX ON editor.
configuration.condenseMode.description: Show a denser HEX ON grid with narrower byte cells, hidden offsets, and no grid edge padding.
configuration.showRuler.description: Show a column ruler above the HEX ON byte grid.
configuration.dbcsAmbiguousExclusionsEna: Use custom byte-pair exclusions for DBCS ambiguous diagnostics. When enabled and no custom list exists yet, default exclusions are written to user settings JSON for editing.
configuration.dbcsAmbiguousExclusions.de: Custom byte-pair exclusions for DBCS ambiguous diagnostics. Each rule excludes a valid DBCS pair from DBCS_AMBIGUOUS warnings while in SBCS mode. The custom list replaces the built-in defaults; use [] to exclude nothing.
configuration.dbcsAmbiguousExclusions.by: Two-byte pair to exclude. Accepted formats include "40 40", "0x40 0x40", and "4040".
configuration.dbcsAmbiguousExclusions.la: Optional note describing why this pair is excluded.
